name: Jackstraw Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove core and stem of the apple; leave the skin on.
2. Cut the apple crosswise into 1/4 rings.
3. Cut each ring into thin strips about 1/8 inch wide.
4. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except lettuce.
5. Toss lightly to mix the Poppy Seed Dressing thoroughly.
6. Serve on crisp lettuce leaves.
- Servings: 8
- Food Exchange per serving: 1 Vegetable Exchange, CAL: 39, CHO: 9g, PRO: 1g, FAT: 1g
- For low-sodium diets, omit salt in the dressing recipe.
